component.name: VimCode
component.summary: Vim-like code editor with GTK4 and tree-sitter

description.p: VimCode is a high-performance Vim+VSCode hybrid editor built in Rust. Modal editing meets modern UX — featuring tree-sitter syntax highlighting, LSP support, a built-in terminal, and a full TUI backend.
CPU-rendered via Cairo/Pango, VimCode works reliably in VMs, remote desktops, and SSH sessions without requiring a GPU.
Initial packaged release with Flatpak support.
